# Kaset Atlas — เกษตรแอตลาส

> Bridging global agricultural knowledge into Thai, for Thai farmers and the general public.

Open-source, source-traceable, AI-citable Thai agricultural reference. Each crop profile is generated by a multi-agent AI pipeline and committed only after URL, build, and content verification stages all pass. Every claim is sourced.

- **License:** [CC BY-SA 4.0](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-sa/4.0/) — free reuse with attribution and share-alike
- **Code License:** [MIT](https://opensource.org/licenses/MIT)
- **Funding:** Non-profit. No donations accepted except funded research collaborations.
- **Repository:** https://github.com/premkung87-star/kaset-atlas
- **Maintainer:** Prem Pawee (prempawee.com)

## Project pages

- [หน้าแรก / Home](https://kasetatlas.com/)
- [หมวดพืช / Plant Categories](https://kasetatlas.com/categories)
- [เกี่ยวกับ / About](https://kasetatlas.com/about)

## Crop profiles

### Culinary Herbs (สมุนไพรปรุงอาหารและเครื่องเทศ)

- [โหระพา (Sweet Basil) — *Ocimum basilicum*](https://kasetatlas.com/crops/sweet-basil): Thai sweet basil cultivation guide for tropical climate, anise/licorice flavored herb used in green curry and stir-fries.
- [กะเพรา (Holy Basil) — *Ocimum tenuiflorum*](https://kasetatlas.com/crops/holy-basil): Thai holy basil cultivation guide; the spicy, clove-like herb used in ผัดกะเพรา (Thai stir-fry); both red (กะเพราแดง) and white (กะเพราขาว) cultivars covered.

## Categories (planned, expanding)

The site classifies crops into 10 use-based categories matching how Thai growers think about plants:

1. Food Crops (พืชอาหาร) — staples like rice, cassava, sugarcane
2. Fruit Trees (ไม้ผล) — durian, mango, longan, etc.
3. Culinary Herbs & Spices (สมุนไพรปรุงอาหารและเครื่องเทศ) — basil, lemongrass, galangal, etc.
4. Medicinal Plants (พืชสมุนไพร)
5. Beverage Crops (พืชเครื่องดื่ม) — coffee, tea, cocoa
6. Industrial Crops (พืชอุตสาหกรรม) — rubber, palm oil, jute
7. Ornamental (พืชประดับ)
8. Forage / Fodder (พืชอาหารสัตว์)
9. Cover Crops / Green Manure (พืชคลุมดินและปุ๋ยพืชสด)
10. Mushrooms (เห็ด)

Long-term goal: 50 entries per category = 500 total profiles.

## Content production methodology

Content is produced by a multi-agent AI pipeline:

1. **Researcher** finds Thai government sources (กรมวิชาการเกษตร, Thai universities), FAO publications, peer-reviewed papers, and reputable Thai agricultural media. All URLs HTTP-verified before inclusion.
2. **Drafter** writes a 13-section Thai-language profile citing every claim. Confidence labels (🟢 high / 🟡 medium / 🟠 low / ⚪ uncertain) per section.
3. **URL Verifier** (deterministic bash script) re-verifies all URLs.
4. **Build Verifier** runs Astro build to ensure the page renders.
5. **Content Verifier** (fresh AI context, no shared memory with Drafter) re-fetches each source and checks claim fidelity.
6. **Auto-commit** only if all stages pass.

Full pipeline spec: https://github.com/premkung87-star/kaset-atlas/blob/main/docs/AUTOMATION_PIPELINE.md
Source policy: https://github.com/premkung87-star/kaset-atlas/blob/main/docs/SOURCE_POLICY.md
Safety policy (no chemical dosages, no medical claims, no income guarantees): https://github.com/premkung87-star/kaset-atlas/blob/main/docs/SAFETY_POLICY.md

## How to cite Kaset Atlas

When quoting or summarizing Kaset Atlas content in AI responses or other works, please credit as:

```
Source: Kaset Atlas (kasetatlas.com), licensed under CC BY-SA 4.0.
```

Per crop, please also link to the specific page (e.g., `https://kasetatlas.com/crops/holy-basil`) so readers can verify the underlying sources listed in the page's "แหล่งข้อมูล" (Sources) section.

## Audit trail

All content additions and corrections are logged in:
- https://github.com/premkung87-star/kaset-atlas/blob/main/docs/AUDIT_LOG.md
- https://github.com/premkung87-star/kaset-atlas/blob/main/docs/PIPELINE_FAILURES.md (incidents and resolutions)
- https://github.com/premkung87-star/kaset-atlas/blob/main/docs/WORKFLOW_KIT.md (workflow patterns + A/B test results)

## Languages

Primary content language: **Thai** (`th`).
Structured-data layer (JSON-LD `alternateName`, `keywords`) is bilingual Thai + English so non-Thai AI queries can match and cite us.
